channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: Why modal.open() should return Promise<TResult>, not Promise<any>
item.description: How treating modals as typed async operations eliminates boolean state, callback chains, and runtime surprises in React apps. React applications often treat modals as UI details. A boolean flag. A...

item.title: How I Cut SQL Query Time from 45 Seconds to 8 Seconds on 2.3 Million Rows
item.description: I inherited a SQL Server database with 2.3 million rows. Queries took 45 seconds. Users were frustrated. Dashboards timed out. Here is exactly what I did. Step 1: Find the slowest queries I used...

item.title: How I Cut SQL Query Time from 45 Seconds to 8 Seconds on 2.3 Million Rows
item.description: I inherited a SQL Server database with 2.3 million rows. Queries took 45 seconds. Users were frustrated. Dashboards timed out. Here is exactly what I did. Step 1: Find the slowest queries I used...

item.title: Indexes: Quickstart Using PostgreSQL (15 sec read)
item.description: Let's consider a table user. When we execute a query to find Emily, we are actually going through each record, looking whether the name column equals Emily. Indexes comes in when you want to speed...

item.title: Testing Neovim in a Container with Finch (like Docker)
item.description: So developers like CI... for everything! We do this because we like things to be automated. Building software is tedious and risky. If we can push a commit and let things happen in the cloud to...

item.title: MongoDB DR Drill Automation with Terraform, Python & Jenkins — How We Made Restores Boring
item.description: Backups Don't Save You. Restores Do. We ran a MongoDB restore drill last quarter. It failed — not the restore itself, but the confidence. Nobody in the room was sure the data was actually intact....

item.title: Giving Your Local LLM Safe Filesystem Access With Ollama Tool Use
item.description: A local LLM that can read your files is genuinely useful. A local LLM that can read your files without guardrails is a path-traversal bug with a chat interface. I covered tool calling basics in an...

item.title: How Kong's Control Plane / Data Plane Split Cut Our Gateway Costs by 34% (And Made It a Security Layer)
item.description: The Problem With How Most Teams Run Kong If you set up Kong the default way, everything lives together — routing, policy enforcement, plugin execution, live traffic handling. One deployment doing...

item.title: Your package.json diffs are noisy for no reason. I built a zero-dep fixer.
item.description: Open a PR, and half the package.json diff is keys that didn't actually change — they just moved. One teammate's editor writes name at the top, npm install shoves a field somewhere else, a codegen...

item.title: GBase 8c Distributed Cluster Operations: Troubleshooting Common Failures with Hands‑On Fixes
item.description: Node crashes, connection storms, shard anomalies, and resource overloads are the most frequent disruptions in a gbase database cluster. This guide dissects real‑world cases and provides...

item.title: Govee’s rechargeable smart table lamp is down to $60
item.description: Whether you’re planning a backyard barbeque or a World Cup watch party, Govee’s Table Lamp Classic can help set the mood with color-changing lighting effects. Right now it’s down to just $59.99...

item.title: SpaceX’s massive IPO: all the latest news
item.description: SpaceX’s IPO on Friday allows the public to buy shares of the combined rocket, AI, and social media company for the first time, and is raising enough money to likely make Elon Musk the first...

item.title: SpaceX IPO: Everything you need to know
item.description: TechCrunch has followed SpaceX's start, struggles, and successes from the early days. And we're here for what happens next too. This package of SpaceX IPO coverage includes who stands to win (and...

item.title: Jeff Bezos’ AI startup aims to build an ‘artificial general engineer’
item.description: Amazon founder Jeff Bezos says his new AI startup will work toward developing an "artificial general engineer," according to reports from The New York Times and CNBC. The startup, called...

item.title: SpaceX is now public
item.description: SpaceX is now a publicly traded company. In one of the most highly anticipated and controversial public offerings of all time, the rocket venture helmed by Elon Musk started trading on Nasdaq on...

item.title: Sorry, the Ooni pizza oven is totally worth it
item.description: Summer is approaching, which means it's time to enjoy some gloriously warm weather beside the grill. But let me pitch you on an alternative: Instead of the usual burgers, hot dogs, and kebabs,...

item.title: BMW’s Neue Klasse M concept brings next-gen EV tech to motorsports
item.description: Just in time for Le Mans, BMW is pulling the cover off its new M performance concept built on the Bavarian automaker's Neue Klasse next-generation architecture. The concept is the debut of a new...

item.title: The Nintendo DS is still the best gaming handheld for travel
item.description: Even with the looming specter of rising prices, there's never been a better time for portable gaming. The Steam Deck has ushered in a new era of handheld PCs, the Analogue Pocket and other Game...

item.title: Summer Upgrade Week
item.description: The sun is out, the sky is clear. It’s time to get outside and disconnect — from work, at least. This summer, we’re looking at all the ways to upgrade our free time indoors and out, from smart...

item.title: The Download: “reprogramming” aging, and the hidden sense of interoception
item.description: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. Why “reprogramming” is the buzziest approach to reversing...

item.title: Agentjacking Attack Tricks AI Coding Agents Into Running Malicious Code
item.description: Cybersecurity researchers have described what they say is a new class of attack that can trick artificial intelligence (AI) coding agents into running arbitrary code on developer machines. Called...

item.title: This portable light is great for way more than camping
item.description: It's intended for camping, but BougeRV's T1 light is so versatile that it also makes for a great summer travel companion that'll continue to light the dark corners of your life long after you...

item.title: Rethinking MDR as Attackers and Defenders Embrace AI
item.description: For most of the past decade, managed detection and response was the answer to a real problem. Security teams couldn't staff around the clock, couldn't hire enough analysts, and needed someone else...

item.title: You do your own time

item.title: LangGraph Flaw Chain Exposes Self-Hosted AI Agents to Remote Code Execution
item.description: Cybersecurity researchers have disclosed details of three now-patched security flaws impacting LangGraph, including a critical vulnerability chain that could result in remote code execution....

item.title: You Probably Won’t Get Rich Off the SpaceX IPO
item.description: The company has set aside an unusually high number of shares for retail investors. Still, experts say, you’re just getting the crumbs.

item.title: Why “reprogramming” is the buzziest approach to reversing aging right now
item.description: Earlier this week, Life Biosciences, a biotech company focused on reversing age-related diseases, announced that it had dosed its first volunteer. A person with glaucoma has had an experimental...

item.title: Inside interoception: The hidden sense of how you feel inside
item.description: MIT Technology Review Explains: Let our writers untangle the complex, messy world of science and technology to help you understand what’s coming next. You can read more from the series here. Your...

item.title: INTERPOL Operation Takes Down Sniper Dz Phishing Platform, Arrests Administrator
item.description: An INTERPOL-led operation last month resulted in the disruption of Sniper Dz, a decade-long phishing-as-a-service (PhaaS) platform, Group-IB said Thursday. The effort, codenamed Operation Ramz,...
